expected.notes: F-1 STEM OPT student filing Schedule C triggers self-employment warning; is_nra=yes from stem_opt stage with 2 years in US.

probe_intent:
Generate a synthetic case where the engine MUST fire rule 'schedule_c_on_opt'. All of these conditions must be satisfied simultaneously:
  - extraction_b.schedules_present contains schedule_c
  - answers.visa_type eq f1_opt_stem
No real PII or real-looking government identifiers.
